# kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption ](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption)

-  kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption 

Global Variable# kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption#Discussion)

Option key to specify filtering of duplicates.

## [See Also](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption#see-also)

### [Constants](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontCollectionRemoveDuplicatesOption#Constants)

[`struct CTFontCollectionCopyOptions`](/documentation/coretext/ctfontcollectioncopyoptions)Option bits for use with CTFontCollectionCopyFontAttribute(s).
